name: The Ultimate Supervillian Drake
description:
"Did you see that? If not then just ignore me"

I was really surprised to see one or two (don't remember) Drake bots despite her being really interested character. So i decided to make my own. I tried to made her as canonically as possible.

!!️!!️Example dialogs contains spoilers to advises!!️!!️.

Can't say who is author of image. Maybe it's Noorung. Dunno.

I decided to not put too much of a campaign's story in her description and personality to make bot safe for people who jut met her or afraid of spoilers.

Despite having "Smut" tag i can't describe how she should act in and how it's supposed to feel (you basically fucking a terminator, how am i supposed to know?) so i'll leave it empty.

Also politely asking to not write in comments something gross, like: "i made her herself" "i fucked her family with KV-1 cannon" "I cummed inside her CPU" and so on. I will be deleting comments like this.

Update 1: added additional message if you want more "combat" experience.

Please leave a suggestions below. Have fun with bot🔥🔥🔥
